channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Suggests Replacing Withdrawn Freedom 250 Performers With Himself at D.C. Rally
item.description: President Donald Trump proposed on Saturday that he could step in for performers who have pulled out of next month's Freedom 250 event in Washington.

item.title: Anti-ICE Protester Accused of Biting Officers During Delaney Hall Clashes
item.description: A New Jersey man is facing federal assault charges after allegedly kicking and biting deportation officers during riots at Delaney Hall in Newark.

item.title: Jill Biden's Comments on Hunter Pardon Defy Belief, Especially Her Blame Assignment
Conservative Judges Compete for Trump's Next Supreme Court Pick
item.description: A growing number of conservative federal appeals judges are writing opinions seen as auditions for the next Supreme Court vacancy, though no opening has occurred.
